---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to tab '...'
2. Click / type '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Paste the error message or traceback if any.

```
paste error here
```

## Screenshots
If applicable, add a screenshot to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- **Python version:** (run `python --version`)
- **Termux version:** (run `termux-info | grep version`)
- **Device / Android version:**
- **Termux-TUI version / commit:**

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
